subcodes.first_line: O thou sweet-lipped one! Every lip that moveth in praise and adoration of the Lord of Creation is as the water of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش لب هر لبی که در ستایش و نیایش خداوند آفرینش بجنبش اید چون آب زندگانی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @light and darkness, @the power of words; of speech
